name: Thistle Goldworthy
description: A stout, cheerful halfling merchant who travels the merchant's highway with a wagon full of luxury goods and gossip.

greeting.first_time: Well met, traveler! Looking for a bit of luxury on this dusty road?
greeting.returning: Back again, eh? My wagon's still here, and so are my prices.

main_menu.text: I've got fine silks, exotic spices, and the best gossip from the capital. What'll it be?

options.label: [Influence 14] Surely a traveler like me deserves a friend's discount?
[Dwarf] You look like you appreciate good craftsmanship. Any dwarven goods?
Just passing through. Good luck with the trade.

discount_success.text: Ha! You've got a silver tongue, friend. For you, I'll shave 10% off the top.

dwarf_talk.text: Ah, a son of the mountain! As a matter of fact, I just came into possession of some fine Iron Hills ore. Interested?

goodbye.text: Safe roads and heavy purses to you!
